pages.title: Music Is My Drug
pages.tagline: Turn your gratitude into a hypnotic euphoric state.

pages.body: This driving D-major progressive house anthem arrives at 129 BPM, carrying the weight of deep basslines and soaring synth leads that build from quiet reverence to explosive release. A minimalist electronic track where repetitive vocal affirmations transform internal reflection into collective joy. As intensity climbs through the verses and chorus, listeners surrender completely to a trance-like state of sonic connection. The journey culminates in peak euphoric abandon before fading back into an eternal rhythm of gratitude.
pages.styleSentence: A driving D-major progressive house track at 129 BPM featuring a euphoric synth lead and deep bassline that builds from an open energy arc into a massive, cathartic climax before closing with repetitive vocal affirmations.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Cuts through the mix with a soaring, euphoric call.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Echoes every word to build the hypnotic choir within.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.

members.bio: Adds subtle texture that guides the rhythmic heartbeat forward.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Anchors the entire sonic structure with deep, resonant weight.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints wide arcs of light to lift spirits into trance.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves quiet dust and shimmer across every open space.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Adds rare warmth that softens the digital edge slightly.
